description_long: This is a tall, ornate corner cabinet designed to fit snugly into the corner of a room, featuring a curved front with decorative trim and three open shelves above a two-door cupboard. The upper section has scalloped shelf edges and intricate carved detailing along the top and midline, giving it a classic, vintage appearance. The lower section consists of a pair of paneled doors with small handles, providing enclosed storage space. The cabinet stands on four short, curved legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The back is flat and unadorned, optimized for corner placement, while the sides are plain and vertical. The entire piece is finished in a uniform light gray color, suggesting it is either painted wood or a similar material.
description: A tall, ornate corner cabinet with three open shelves and a two-door cupboard below, finished in light gray with decorative trim and curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved shelves, decorative trim, and two-door cupboard with handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth, plain side panel, and the profile of the shelves and doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back designed for corner placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and side profile.
